highlights.headline: Magic win big on the road vs. Timberwolves
highlights.description: Magic win big on the road vs. Timberwolves

tracking.trackingName: COM_NBA Highlight (Magic win big on the road vs. Timberwolves) 2026/03/07 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Desmond Bane scored 30 points, Paolo Banchero added 25 points and 15 rebounds, and the Orlando Magic won their third straight game by beating the Minnesota Timberwolves 119-92 on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Banchero and Bane combine for 55 points, Magic beat Timberwolves 119-92

video.headline: Magic win big on the road vs. Timberwolves

tracking.trackingName: COM_NBA Highlight (Magic win big on the road vs. Timberwolves) 2026/03/07 ESHEET

highlights.headline: Brooklyn Nets vs. Detroit Pistons: Game Highlights
highlights.description: Brooklyn Nets vs. Detroit Pistons: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Brooklyn Nets vs. Detroit Pistons: Game Highlights) 2026/03/07 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Ziaire Williams made two 3-pointers in the final three minutes and the Brooklyn Nets ended a 10-game losing streak by rallying to beat the Detroit Pistons 107-105 on Saturday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Nets end 10-game losing streak by rallying from down 23 points to stun Pistons 107-105

video.headline: Brooklyn Nets vs. Detroit Pistons: Game Highlights

highlights.headline: Hawks take down 76ers for sixth straight win
highlights.description: The Hawks stay hot with a win over the 76ers behind a big performance from Jalen Johnson.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NBA Highlight (Hawks take down 76ers for sixth straight win) 2026/03/07 ESHEET SOTFULL

headlines.description: — Jalen Johnson had 35 points, 10 rebounds and seven assists and Nickeil Alexander-Walker added 24 points as the Atlanta Hawks beat the Philadelphia 76ers 126-116 on Saturday night for their season-best sixth straight victory.
headlines.shortLinkText: Johnson scores 35 in Hawks' 126-116 win over 76ers as Maxey leaves in final minute with hand injury

video.headline: Hawks take down 76ers for sixth straight win

tracking.trackingName: COM_NBA Highlight (Hawks take down 76ers for sixth straight win) 2026/03/07 ESHEET SOTFULL

highlights.description: LA Clippers vs. Memphis Grizzlies: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (LA Clippers vs. Memphis Grizzlies: Game Highlights) 2026/03/08 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Kawhi Leonard had 28 points, Darius Garland scored 11 of his 21 points in the fourth quarter and the Los Angeles Clippers held on for a 123-120 victory over the Memphis Grizzlies on Saturday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Leonard, Garland and Mathurin power the Clippers past the Grizzlies 123-120

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Utah Jazz vs. Milwaukee Bucks: Game Highlights) 2026/03/08 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Giannis Antetokounmpo had 27 points, nine rebounds and eight assists as the Milwaukee Bucks snapped a four-game skid by beating the Utah Jazz 113-99 on Saturday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Antetokounmpo scores 27 as Bucks beat Jazz 113-99 to snap four-game skid

headlines.description: — Shai Gilgeous-Alexander scored 27 points, and the Oklahoma City Thunder defeated the Golden State Warriors 104-97 on Saturday night for their fifth straight win.
headlines.shortLinkText: Gilgeous-Alexander scores 27 as the Thunder beat the Warriors 104-97 for 5th straight win
